title: 皐月賞の後に・ジャンプ&キャッチ！

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yessss, I did it... I really did it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was up against a pack of giants, but I opened up
a gap between 'em 'n got through! Didja see dat,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aaaargh, my legs!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha, nah, I'm not lookin' too good here... but I
knew it was gonna be like this.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I might be a runt, but this runt leapt up 'n
nabbed a memento for the fam back home...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gripped between Tamamo Cross's hands is the
prize she jumped up and seized—the Satsuki Sho
crown.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So this is what the Classic Triple Crown's like,
huh? Everyone was fightin' for their lives just to
get a better position. My body feels like it's been
put through the wringer...
choice_data_list:
It looks like you weren't the only one who had it
rough.

It looks like you weren't the only one who had it
rough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, ya talkin' 'bout her?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Urk! Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Can't say I'm surprised. In a race this major,
standin' out works against ya...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They'll mark ya, then no matter where ya go,
there they are. Still, haven't heard her
complainin'...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's more to her than glitz 'n glam... That's for
sure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross approaches Gold City.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
City, you were great out there. That race really
put us through the wringer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But that look tells me... you're not even thinkin'
about backin' down. That glint in your eye... It's
sparklin' brighter than your hair is.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. People think I'm just some pretty
face, but I'm more than that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And you're not just some runt. You may be short,
but those guts of yours are on par with some of
the biggest stars.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on winning the Satsuki Sho,
Tamamo.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heh, thanks. 'Preciate it. Y'know, there's more to
us than meets the eye.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now I can't wait to race you again! Just thinkin' about competin' with another hot-blooded racer's got my blood boilin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two nod, their gazes meeting as they regard
each other with fiery determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, in an amazing showcase of sheer power
and determination, Tamamo Cross grasps the first
crown of the Classic Triple Crown.
